title: thlaspi divaricatum
intro: Thlaspi divaricatum, also known as field penny-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, with compounds such as isothiocyanates and glucosinolates exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thlaspi divaricatum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to support immune function. Herbal preparations of Thlaspi divaricatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
